Get out of here, vaulty!

You're getting mighty close to our side of the Range, lilac, and we don't take kindly to hothouse flowers like you 'round here.  

Maybe if I'd heard of you, I'd have more respect, but you're so fresh out of your hole I can still smell your shampoo. 

Now, take off, afore you get yourself hurt.

Oh, it's [%name]!

I don't want any trouble from you!  I mean, I've always been able to work out some amicable solution with you nice Company folk.  Just take a look at my wares here, surely there's something you like?
[$inst]This kiosk allows you to replay the introduction fly by that occured the first time you entered backrange. Press 'View Fly By' to watch. [$/inst]
